# Mobile View & Responsive Tester

> Mobile View & Responsive Tester is a free, local-first, open-source Chrome extension for reviewing responsive websites across multiple device viewports in one workspace.

The extension is a responsive development and quality-assurance aid. It previews the page already open in Chrome across phones, tablets, foldables, laptops, desktops, and custom viewport sizes. It is not a replacement for final testing on physical devices and target browsers.

Core capabilities include up to four resizable previews, device rotation and zoom, saved device sets, synchronized scrolling and navigation, design comparison, annotated captures, source-tab recording, physical-device URL handoff, and locally generated coding-agent fix prompts.

Privacy and licensing facts:

- The extension is open source under the MIT license.
- It has no extension account system, advertising, telemetry, or remote application backend.
- URLs, workspace settings, saved sets, captures, recordings, design references, and fix-prompt content remain on the user's device unless the user explicitly copies, downloads, opens, or shares them.
- The fix-prompt feature formats text locally and does not send code or prompts to an AI provider.
- Some pages cannot be embedded because of browser restrictions, authentication flows, or frame-protection policies.
- Localhost pages are supported. Opening a development page on a physical phone requires a LAN-reachable address rather than localhost.

## Product

- [Official website](https://edisonaugusthy.github.io/multi-device-viewer/): Product overview, main features, privacy commitments, frequently asked questions, and installation link.
- [Install from the Chrome Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/jfcnekmenjickfihkniaoaklehjmdhdb): Official Chrome extension listing.
- [Source repository](https://github.com/edisonaugusthy/multi-device-viewer): Public source code, implementation history, and contribution surface.

## Documentation

- [Responsive testing guide](https://edisonaugusthy.github.io/multi-device-viewer/guides/responsive-testing.html): Practical checklist covering viewport selection, layout integrity, interaction, accessibility, evidence, and physical-device validation.
- [Privacy policy](https://edisonaugusthy.github.io/multi-device-viewer/privacy.html): Plain-language description of extension data handling, Chrome permissions, local storage, and third-party behavior.
- [Changelog](https://edisonaugusthy.github.io/multi-device-viewer/changelog.html): Current release notes and product improvements.

## Support

- [Public issue tracker](https://github.com/edisonaugusthy/multi-device-viewer/issues): Bug reports, feature requests, privacy questions, and corrections.

## Optional

- [MIT license](https://github.com/edisonaugusthy/multi-device-viewer/blob/main/LICENSE): Terms for using, modifying, and distributing the source code.
